candidate_definitions.text: Three.js-based implemetation of a renderer for [3D Gaussian Splatting for Real-Time Radiance Field Rendering](https://repo-sam.inria.fr/fungraph/3d-gaussian-splatting/), a technique for generating 3D scenes from 2D images. Their project is CUDA-based and needs to run natively on…

File format for 3D Gaussian splats. About 10x smaller than the PLY equivalent with virtually no perceptible loss in visual quality. Offered as open source by Niantic Labs. More details at https://scaniverse.com/spz #3dgaussiansplats #gaussiansplatting
`.spz` is a file format for compressed 3D gaussian splats. This directory contains a C++ library
